repo_prior_art.cite: none; the closest catalogue entries are stat_policy_regret_margin_overlap and stat_dose_response_minimax, with different estimands and risk criteria

published_prior_art.cite: CaiLow2004 gives ordered-modulus expected-length lower bounds for linear functionals in Gaussian models, not this causal max functional

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no catalogue entry studies honest adaptive interval length for an optimal-policy value

published_prior_art.cite: XuGuo2026 proves estimator-class asymptotic-variance optimality, while WhitehouseChenAusternSyrgkanis2025 and ShiLuSong2020 give valid optimal-value inference; none characterizes union-honest minimax expected length
LuedtkeVanderLaan2016 supplies root-n optimal-value inference under sufficient fixed-law conditions; the union-honest framing is additional but the reduction is a sanity corollary
CaiLow2004, XuGuo2026, and WhitehouseChenAusternSyrgkanis2025 do not calculate the proposed causal margin--tie--smoothness ordered-modulus diagram

structure_flags.label: Theorem 2 / project headline
structure_flags.one_line: The strongest kernel is presented as a theorem despite the only specified interval being a high-level construction handle; relabel the frontier claim as a conjecture and retain the adaptation-diagram OEQ as its explicit open residual.

soundness_flags.label: def:margin-tie-smoothness-class and all statements using it
soundness_flags.one_line: The class is declared as observed-data laws P in P(O) but requires consistency and exchangeability involving undefined potential outcomes Y(a); define a full-data law class and its observed-data image, and restrict zeta_j to admissible nonempty strata with 0 <= p_{j,-} <= p_{j,+} <= 1.

soundness_flags.label: def:honest-interval-class / def:crossfitted-smoothing-handle / Theorem 2
soundness_flags.one_line: C_n^star is not yet a mathematical interval construction: the nuisance learners, scale grid, bias envelope, studentizer, and measurable connected interval output are unspecified, while mathfrak C_n currently admits arbitrary subsets of R whose length need not be defined.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The asserted uniform cross-fitted AIPW frontier has no theorem-side uniform nuisance-estimability condition, especially for the otherwise unrestricted propensity e_P; the cited smoothing literature itself conditions its limit theory on nuisance consistency and convergence rates.

source_verification_receipts.locator: p. 1805 abstract; pp. 1810--1811, Theorem 1 and equation (8)
source_verification_receipts.verified_claim: The paper treats linear functionals in Gaussian nonparametric models and derives expected-length lower bounds using ordered between-class moduli.
The paper develops adaptive smoothing and proves an asymptotic-variance lower bound for robust asymptotically linear unbiased estimators, attained by its estimator.
The paper gives a subagging estimator, asymptotic normality, a variance estimator, and a Wald CI for the optimal value in nonregular cases.

source_verification_receipts.locator: abstract, lines 21--24; HTML proof discussion lines 766--768
source_verification_receipts.verified_claim: The paper uses a constant-number-of-nuisance-fits softmax construction and its inference results impose nuisance consistency and convergence-rate conditions.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Recast Theorem 2 as a conjecture, give C_n^star an exact finite-grid bias-aware formula, and add law-primitive uniform nuisance-estimability conditions plus construction-side learners attaining them.

Define a full-data model whose observed-data image is P_j, specify admissible zeta_j values and nonemptiness/slack conditions, and restrict mathfrak C_n to measurable connected intervals with finite length.
Replace the abstract asymp-to-omega claim with explicit orders and least-favorable submodels for at least two tie/margin/smoothness regimes, including the boundary where honest adaptation fails.

recommended_next_step: Continue revision on this angle: repair the full-data and interval definitions, state uniform nuisance conditions, and relabel the main frontier as an open conjecture before Stage 0.
